meta.solver: interFoam (VOF), OpenFOAM ESI v2312, Open MPI 4.1.6
meta.purpose: MPI strong-scaling of a representative 3D forced-roll sloshing case to size the 3D L-tank run (this box vs a heavier node)
meta.geometry: methodology near-square plan-form (NOT the real B1546 tank; real B_db/D_db from #640)
meta.note: Timed stage = solver only (blockMesh/setFields/decomposePar are untimed setup). s_per_step normalises out any adaptive-dt step-count drift across ranks.

contention.followup_512k_run: a cpb=80/512k sweep launched next was INVALIDATED — box load spiked to ~24 (an npm install + other work saturated the cores); np=16 came out slower than np=8, a pure contention artifact, so clean high-core scaling could not be measured on this shared box right now
contention.implication: the binding constraint on a-l-2 is not the interFoam scaling (0.93 efficiency at 4 cores is excellent) but that the box is heavily SHARED; sustained high-core CFD contends with other work and wall-clock is unpredictable during busy periods

production_projection.basis: 216k-cell case, s_per_step measured here; a real 3D case is ~6-12 drive cycles ~ 1000-2500 steps (adaptive dt)
production_projection.note: finer production meshes (500k-1M cells) cost ~2-5x more per step but scale to more cores; on a-l-2 the shared-load ceiling matters more than the core count

machine_verdict.solver_scaling: interFoam scales well intrinsically — 0.93 parallel efficiency at 4 cores, ~0.6 at 8 (216k cells); the knee is a cells/rank limit (efficiency craters below ~27k cells/rank)
machine_verdict.adequate_for: single 3D cases + small methodology sweeps at ~4-8 cores, ideally in a quiet window (~15-40 min per 216k-cell case)
machine_verdict.wait_for_heavier_node: only for a LARGE production sweep needing predictable high-throughput wall-clock — a-l-2's shared load (not core count) is then the binding constraint; a dedicated/less-contended node or scheduled quiet-window runs would fix it. GPU boxes do NOT help (interFoam is CPU/MPI-bound)
machine_verdict.real_gate: still the geometry (#640 real B_db/D_db), not compute — a 3D run without it is methodology-only regardless of machine
